entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of legumes including pulses, groundnuts, and soybean used for food and feed

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: A type of grain legume with slower global production growth

entities.name: GROUNDNUTS
entities.description: A type of grain legume included in global production trends

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A grain legume with significant production increases driven by demand for protein meals and oils

entities.name: GLOBAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total worldwide output of grain legumes, which doubled between 1980-82 and 2004-06

entities.name: PROTEIN MEALS
entities.description: A soybean-derived product demanded by the EU and US feed sectors

entities.name: OILS
entities.description: A product derived from grain legumes, specifically soybeans, used for trade and consumption

entities.name: EU
entities.description: The European Union, a major consumer of soybean protein meals and oils for its feed sector

entities.name: US
entities.description: The United States, a major consumer of soybean protein meals and oils for its feed sector

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country that has emerged as a new producer of soybeans

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: A country that has emerged as a new producer of soybeans

entities.name: ARGENTINA
entities.description: A new producer and major exporter of soybeans

entities.name: BRAZIL
entities.description: A new producer and major exporter of soybeans

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions that produce the majority of global grain legumes and pulses

entities.name: CANADA
entities.description: A country contributing to the increase in global pulse production

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A country contributing to the increase in global pulse production

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region experiencing area expansion under pulse cultivation

entities.name: SOUTH EAST ASIAN COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions characterized by export-oriented production of pulses

entities.name: DEVELOPED COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions with considerably higher yield levels and yield growth rates for grain legumes

entities.name: YIELD LEVELS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: YIELD GROWTH RATES
entities.description: The rate of increase in crop yield over time

entities.name: KERNELS/SEEDS
entities.description: A primary form in which grain legumes are traded

entities.name: CAKES AND MEALS
entities.description: A processed form in which grain legumes are traded

entities.name: PARAGUAY
entities.description: A country that has emerged as a major exporter of soybeans

entities.name: GLOBAL TRADE
entities.description: The international exchange of grain legumes in various forms

entities.name: PRICE TRENDS
entities.description: The fluctuations and movements in the market price of grain legumes
